about.title: About Us
about.heroSubtitle: A surf house born from passion, built on community, and rooted in the pura vida spirit of Costa Rica.
about.storyTitle: Born from a Love of Surfing
about.storyP1: Mai Ke Kai — Hawaiian for "From the Sea" — began as a dream shared by a group of surfers who fell in love with Tamarindo's perfect waves, warm people, and infectious pura vida spirit.
about.storyP2: What started as a simple guesthouse grew into a full surf camp experience. We wanted a place where travelers could arrive as strangers and leave as lifelong friends — all connected by their shared love for the ocean.
about.storyP3: Today, we welcome guests from over 30 countries every year. Whether you're a first-time surfer or a seasoned wave-chaser, Mai Ke Kai is your home base for the ultimate Costa Rica surf experience.
about.valuesSubtitle: More than just a place to sleep — we're a full experience designed for surfers, adventurers, and culture seekers.
about.valueSurfDesc: Our certified instructors have years of experience teaching beginners and advancing intermediate surfers in Tamarindo's consistent waves.
about.valueCommunityDesc: Travelers from 30+ countries meet here. Share meals, stories, and sessions with fellow surf enthusiasts from around the world.
about.valueLocationDesc: Steps from Tamarindo Beach, one of Central America's most famous surf breaks. Wake up and paddle out in minutes.
about.valueQualityDesc: Clean rooms, great beds, fast Wi-Fi, and all the amenities you need to recover between sessions.
about.valueSustainableDesc: We care about the ocean and local ecosystem. We promote reef-safe sunscreen, responsible tourism, and coastal clean-ups.
about.valueWavesDesc: Tamarindo delivers surf every season. Whether you come in dry or rainy season, the waves are waiting for you.
about.teamFoundersBio: Surfers at heart, they turned a love for pura vida into a place for the world to stay, surf, and connect.
about.teamSurfBio: Local and international certified coaches passionate about sharing the joy of riding waves safely.
about.teamHostBio: Friendly faces ready to help with anything from surf tips to local restaurant recommendations.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to Catch Your First Wave?
about.ctaSubtitle: Book your spot at Mai Ke Kai and experience the magic of Tamarindo — waves, community, and pura vida.
